visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a middle-aged male main character wearing a blue flat cap, glasses, and a black t-shirt standing in front of a large, colorful map of Taiwan with promotional logos. He gestures with his hands while speaking directly to the camera in an outdoor urban setting with bright natural light and city building backgrounds. (2) A transition occurs as the camera pans up to a large red 'miko' logo above a storefront. The scene shifts indoors to a brightly lit retail environment with wooden shelves filled with technology products, where several staff members wearing blue masks are seen working behind a counter and processing orders. (3) The main character stands in front of tall stacks of white iPhone 17 Pro Max boxes. He points toward the inventory with a smiling expression, highlighting the availability of products in a studio-like retail setting with clean shelving. (4) A close-up shows a gold iPhone being held and moved to catch the light, followed by a shot of the main character sitting across from a staff member. A Casio calculator is shown in a tight close-up with the number '30000' on the screen, indicating a high trade-in value or price for a used device. (5) The camera focuses on a display rack of colorful phone cases in their packaging on a shelf with promotional price tags indicating a '200' discount. The lighting is even and bright indoor lighting, showcasing the variety of accessories available on the shelves. (6) The final phase shows the main character outside the store again, holding a bright orange 'miko' shopping bag and a smaller green bag. He smiles widely and points toward the camera, concluding his promotion as he holds up the orange bag for a final close-up that reveals text details on the bag.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko 米可手機館. [Subtitle]: 最近後台. (2) [Subtitle]: 問最多的就是. [Variety]: iPhone到底要去哪買才有現貨又划算? (3) [Subtitle]: 你問我就問對人了. [Subtitle]: 走 我今天就帶你到我. [Subtitle]: 心目中首選的. (4) [Logo]: miko. [Variety]: Miko手機館. [Subtitle]: 我用三個理由告訴你. (5) [Subtitle]: 為什麼要來這邊買. [Subtitle]: 絕對是最聰明的選擇啦. [Variety]: 推薦理由#1. [Slogan]: 第一重驚喜 現貨滿滿滿. (6) [Subtitle]: 外面都說它缺貨要等. [Subtitle]: 這裡滿滿的現貨. [Subtitle]: 來米可完全不用等. (7) [Subtitle]: 馬上就可以拿到新手機. [Variety]: #心動了. [Variety]: 推薦理由#2. [Slogan]: 第二重暴擊 舊換新. (8) [Subtitle]: 我把這隻舊手機16Pro. [Subtitle]: 幫我估估看. [Variety]: #2倍加速. [Slogan]: 估價3萬元. (9) [Subtitle]: 欸 各位. [Subtitle]: 沒想到這麼敢收. [Subtitle]: 這種回收價. (10) [Subtitle]: 真的是都市傳說級的啦. [Subtitle]: 太扯了. [Variety]: 推薦理由#3. (11) [Slogan]: 折200元. [Subtitle]: 好康拿不完. [Subtitle]: 只要有新機. (12) [Subtitle]: 旁邊有沒有看到這些配件. [Subtitle]: 現場通通折200. [Subtitle]: 而且只要在10/26前. (13) [Subtitle]: 購買iPhone17系列. [Subtitle]: 還可以抽一支. [Subtitle]: 全新的iPhone17. [Slogan]: 全新iPhone17. (14) [Subtitle]: 很誇張耶. [Variety]: (happy臉). [Subtitle]: 跟你講. (15) [Subtitle]: 你現在就知道. [Subtitle]: 為什麼我推薦米可了吧. [Subtitle]: 結論只有一個. (16) [Subtitle]: 聽Tim哥的 買iPhone17. [Subtitle]: 來米可手機館就對了. [Subtitle]: 連結在下面 趕快去看. (17) [Subtitle]: 我自己也幫員工又買了一支.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim-ge), 2 staff members in masks, and 1 female customer partially visible.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with glasses, wearing a blue denim-textured flat cap and a black t-shirt with 'OKX' and 'McLaren' logos.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves from an outdoor urban sidewalk with a large map poster to a modern electronics retail interior featuring wooden display shelves, glass counters, and multiple product boxes (iPhone).

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an energetic male vocal delivery in Mandarin Chinese. The voice is clear, high-pitched, and exhibits significant pitch variability to convey excitement. A rhythmic, upbeat electronic background music (BGM) with a steady 120 BPM tempo plays continuously. (2) A digital 'whoosh' sound effect marks a transition to the store environment. The speaker's voice maintains a high arousal level as he introduces the shop name. The BGM remains consistent in the background, providing a cheerful, high-energy atmosphere with a strong synth beat. (3) As the speaker lists specific reasons for the recommendation, his speech rate is moderately fast. A percussive 'beep' sound effect from a calculator is clearly audible, synchronized with the visual of the price display. The ambient noise floor is low, suggesting a controlled indoor recording. (4) In the final phase, the speaker's vocal intensity increases as he delivers a closing call to action and brand slogan. The BGM swells slightly in volume, featuring bright electronic textures. A soft rustling sound of a shopping bag occurs just before the audio fades out into silence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Reason 1 -> Reason 2 -> Reason 3 -> Summary -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-energy commercial endorsement for the 'miko' mobile phone store. The creator uses a vlog-style 'three reasons' list format to emphasize the store's stock availability of the latest iPhone model, its high trade-in valuation for older devices, and the discounted prices on phone accessories. The ultimate goal is to build trust through personal recommendation and drive sales for the store.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct recommendation of the store name 'miko' and specific promotional offers for buying the iPhone 17.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High production value commercial for a Taiwanese mobile retailer featuring a well-known tech influencer.
